title: notholaena schaffneri var. mexicana
intro: Notholaena schaffneri var. mexicana, also known as the Mexican rock fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Lomariopsidaceae family. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Notholaena schaffneri var. mexicana include the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
